results.title: The Office Gurus is hiring a temporary HR associate in Belmopan
results.description: By Breaking Belize News Staff (HP): Job seekers in the capital, take note. The Office Gurus is recruiting a Temporary HR Associate for its Belmopan operation, and the posting comes with a notable sweetener: the possibility of permanent employment. The role is on-site and centers on the onboarding side of human resources. The successful candidate [...] The post The Office Gurus is hiring a temporary HR associate in Belmopan appeared first on Belize News and Opinion on www.breakingbelizenews.com .

San Diego On The Hunt For City Land To Ease Its Housing Squeeze
results.description: The city's master plan will map public land for affordable homes and shelters; neighborhood open houses begin late July with registration online.

results.title: House Budget Committee advances Reconciliation 3.0 amid GOP divisions
results.description: WASHINGTON (Gray DC) – The House Budget Committee advanced a $95 billion legislative package Thursday, known as “Reconciliation 3.0,” as Republicans move to use the special budget process for a third time to bypass the Senate filibuster. The bill faces unified Democratic opposition and resistance from some members of the GOP. House Speaker Mike Johnson [...] The post House Budget Committee advances Reconciliation 3.0 amid GOP divisions appeared first on News Pub .
